productDisplayName: Wrangler Women English Florals Vanilla White Shirt
description: Vanilla white shirt with blue floral print, has a mandarin collar with an open V-neck running into a front full buttoned placket with fabric buttons, short sleeves with elasticated hems, pin tucked and thin laced chest panel, flaired panel at the bust with mild gathers at the mid back, drawcord at the hem and badge stitched at the left waist
